title: IS there a Document creator that can populate links in link field as hyperlinks automatically?
excerpt: I’ve been experimenting with DocuGen to create succinct one page summaries of key information in our Programs board - I like all of its capabilities except when it pulls a link field, there is now way for it to automatic…

posts.author: Liesel (Liesel Robinson)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve been experimenting with DocuGen to create succinct one page summaries of key information in our Programs board - I like all of its capabilities except when it pulls a link field, there is now way for it to automatically create hyperlink in the document. I really want these summaries to have clickable links. IS there a nother integeration that might do this? Or is there a similar app that creates Google docs rather than worddocs? Google doc autmatically recognizes the hyperlinks…
